nasb.text: so these also now have been disobedient, that because of the mercy shown to you they also may now be shown mercy.

esv.text: so they too have now been disobedient in order that by the mercy shown to you they also may now receive mercy.

cnv.text: 照樣，他們因著你們所蒙的憐憫，現在也不順服，使他們現在也可以蒙憐憫。

ccb.text: 同样，他们现在不顺服是为了使你们蒙怜悯，好使他们也蒙怜悯。

csbs.text: 照样，他们如今也不肯信从，为要藉着你们所蒙的怜悯，让他们现在也可以蒙怜悯，
